name: Bombardier Beetle

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It steps in and snaps with a frontal bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it from the front or weave in and out of melee range.
attacks.notes: Its only purely physical option, used when the player is already too close.

attacks.name: Close-Range Spray
attacks.tell: It raises its abdomen and blasts acid directly in front of itself at short range.
attacks.howToAvoid: Leave the frontal cone as soon as the abdomen lifts.
attacks.notes: Leaves acid on the ground and punishes staying glued to the beetle.

attacks.name: Ranged Shot
attacks.tell: It aims its abdomen at the player and spits a long-range acid projectile.
attacks.howToAvoid: Strafe before it finishes lining up the shot.
attacks.notes: Its safest way to keep pressure when the player backs off.

attacks.name: 3 Upwards Shot
attacks.tell: It points its abdomen upward and launches several shots that rain down around it.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not stay near the beetle after the first shot; move out of the acid splash zone.
attacks.notes: Covers the area around it and leaves several active puddles at once.

description: An aggressive beetle that mixes bites with boiling acid projectiles. Its glands are valuable, but ignoring the corrosive puddles usually ends badly.
behavior: It usually patrols alone or in small groups and sometimes sleeps at its spawn point. It does not roam too far, but it watches its front arc carefully.
interactionWithPlayer: It is immediately hostile to the player. If given space, it prefers to spray or lob acid and cover the floor; if the player crowds it, it answers with bites or a short spray.
interactionWithCreatures: It remains neutral toward other creatures unless directly provoked.
strategy: Fresh damage and axes are the cleanest answer. More than the beetle itself, watch where the acid will land; many losses come from staying in the puddle to keep swinging.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 30
Close-Range Spray: 20
Ranged Shot: 35
3 Upwards Shot: 35

specialTraits: All of its acid sprays leave dangerous puddles on the ground for a short time. It is also immune to burning damage.
